# Emigro

> Corridor-first relocation navigator. Users free. First corridor: Russian-speaking applicants → Portugal. Contributor/update API is Phase 2 after corridor validation.

## For LLM agents (Phase 2 corridor updates)

- **Contributor API guide:** /docs/API_CONTRIBUTOR_GUIDE.md
- **System prompt:** /docs/CONTRIBUTOR_PROMPT.md
- **Example batch JSON:** /examples/contributor/portugal-d8-batch.json
- **Architecture:** /docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
- **Schema:** /docs/SCHEMA_AND_API.md

## API (when live)

- `GET /api/v1/meta/contributor-guide` — this guide as markdown
- `GET /api/v1/meta/ingest-schema` — JSON Schema for proposals
- `GET /api/v1/meta/requirement-types` — valid requirement codes
- `GET /api/v1/corridors/ru-speaking-to-portugal` — active corridor
- `GET /api/v1/corridors/ru-speaking-to-portugal/gaps` — what corridor data is missing
- `GET /api/v1/knowledge/exists` — preflight before submit
- `POST /api/v1/knowledge/proposals/batch` — submit extracted facts

## Rules

1. Official sources only (government, embassy, legislation)
2. Every proposal: source_url + raw_excerpt (verbatim quote)
3. Preflight before create; use update for corrections
4. Submit order: corridor source/digest → program → requirements → costs → passports

## Auth

Register at /contributors → API key → `Authorization: Bearer <key>`
